description: BeyondCorp is a Google Cloud zero-trust access product for managing secure access to applications and resources. Its API covers BeyondCorp resources such as app connections, app connectors, app gateways, operations, and security gateways.
summary: BeyondCorp exposes a Google Cloud REST API at `https://beyondcorp.googleapis.com` and is also managed through the `gcloud beyondcorp` CLI; both use Google Cloud OAuth-based authentication.
